title: taraxacum egregium
intro: Taraxacum egregium, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include its high content of vitamins A, C, and K, as well as its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Taraxacum egregium include its ability to support kidney function, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate digestive issues. Taraxacum egregium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used as a food ingredient in some salads and smoothies.
